title: select_with_fee: no iteration bound — infinite loop if fee non-monotone
description: wallet/src/tx_builder.rs select_with_fee loops until required_fee == fee with no upper bound. Comment asserts fee is monotone-non-decreasing with note count, which is true for current zip317_fee. But: (a) there is no debug_assert inside the loop, (b) a future zip317_fee change breaking monotonicity causes an infinite loop. Trigger: any regression that makes zip317_fee(sapling_logical_actions(n,2)) decrease as n increases. Bad behavior: hang in send_payment. Fix: bound by notes.len() + 2 iterations, return TxBuildError::BuilderError if exceeded.
